---
title: "CzechVeg-Open"
format: html
---

CzechVeg-Open is a publicly available, full version of the Czech Vegetation Database, containing all vegetation-plot records included in the database. The taxonomy and nomenclature of plant taxa are not fully harmonized. The data description is available [here](https://czechvegetationdatabase.github.io/Data/data_description.html).

CzechVeg-Open is available in two formats: the Turboveg 2 format, which requires the [Turboveg 2](https://czechvegetationdatabase.github.io/About/turboveg_windows.html) program, and the CSV format (see the [Data processing tutorial](https://czechvegetationdatabase.github.io/DataProcessingTutorial/data_processing_tutorial.html)).

**Version 1.0**

-   Compiled on: 3 November 2025
-   Size: 117,740 vegetation plots
-   DOI: https:/doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18289905
-   Licence: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC-BY)
-   Download
    -   Vegetation-plot data in Turboveg 2 format
    -   Vegetation-plot data in CSV format
    -   Species nomenclature (useful for interpretation of plant taxon concepts and names)
    -   [Turboveg species list](https://czechvegetationdatabase.github.io/About/files/species.zip) (necessary for Turboveg 2)
    -   [Turboveg popup lists](https://czechvegetationdatabase.github.io/About/files/popup.zip) (necessary for Turboveg 2)
